name: Tab Complete
desc: Player presses Tab in chat. Sends the partial message/command for auto-complete.

fields.name: targetBlock
fields.desc: Block position the cursor is over (can be null)

implementation.overview: Requests tab-completion for a partial message. Modules: AntiTabComplete (cancel to prevent command discovery).

modules.name: AntiTabComplete
modules.purpose: Cancel to prevent server from seeing what you tab-completed.
